title: Add PhoneStorm promotional banner as a static asset

requirements.summary: Display PhoneStorm promotional image as a banner in the dashboard consistent with the dark/warm-accent theme
acceptanceCriteria: The PhoneStorm promotional image (phonestorm-banner.dim_1024x1024.png) is placed in frontend/public/assets/generated/
The image is rendered visibly in the dashboard UI as a banner or featured card
The image display is responsive and does not overflow its container
The image integrates visually with the existing dark background and card-based layout

file_operations.description: Add a promotional banner section that displays the PhoneStorm image from frontend/public/assets/generated/phonestorm-banner.dim_1024x1024.png. Position it prominently in the dashboard layout (e.g., above or within the main content area). Ensure the banner uses responsive width constraints (max-width) and rounded corners consistent with the existing card-based design. Maintain the dark background and ensure the banner integrates visually with the warm-accent theme.
